Name: Deployment Orchestrator (custom, Phase 5 deploy)
Description: Grants ONLY the ability to run/validate/what-if a subscription-scoped ARM deployment (main.bicep is `targetScope = 'subscription'` since it creates the resource group itself). Deliberately does not grant any Action on the resources such a deployment creates — that authorization still comes entirely from the existing RG-scoped Contributor + Role Based Access Control Administrator role assignments on rg-contextforge-dev. Azure evaluates 'can this caller run a deployment at this scope' and 'can this caller create the specific resources it declares' as two separate checks, so this role does not widen the deploy app's actual resource-level blast radius beyond that one resource group.
